main.description: Poll a device-pairing attempt by `deviceId`. While the user has not acted, returns `pending`. On approval, returns `session` together with the granted provider session. Terminal negative states are `denied`, `expired`, and `consumed`. An unknown `deviceId` is `unknown`.

session.description: The granted provider session; present only when `status` is `session`.

errors.name: NotFound
errors.description: No pairing attempt exists for this `deviceId`.
